title: TOPDON Battery Tester BT600, 12V 24V Car Battery Tester with Printer, 100 to 2000 CCA, 3.5" Color Screen 5.9ft Cable, Software Update Available
features: 🏷️Professional Car Battery Tester 12V&24V --- Adopting cutting-edge conductivity testing technology, the TOPDON BT600 car battery tester with printer performs various tests and offers suggestions correspondingly. Battery testing for 12V batteries shows a battery's health, rated CCA, etc. Cranking and Charging tests can check cranking systems and charging systems, allowing technicians to accurately determine fault location through this smart battery analyzer.

Work on More Batteries --- Supporting tests for 12V & 24V Lead-Acid batteries 🔋(CCA 100 to 2000A), this car battery health checker enables professionals to work on Sedans, Motorcycles, Pickup Trucks, Heavy-Duty Trucks, and Boats. With the BT600 battery tester with printer, technicians can complete more testing jobs on batteries, such as regular flooded, AGM Flat, AGM Spiral, GEL, and EFB batteries.

3.5” Color Screen & Built-In Printer --- This car battery health tester comes with a3.5” color screen, which you cannot find a bigger one on Amazon, and intuitive user interface enable simple operation. With a built-in printer🖨️, this digital car battery tester allows users to print reports immediately with thermal sensitive paper, suitable for shops to print out whenever a proof or record is needed. The data Playback function can save data from the last test performed, making it easier for users to check the data.

Easy to Use --- Equipped with multiple navigation keys, the topdon bt600 car battery tester provides smooth, user-friendly operation. Test results with up to 99.5% accuracy to be clearly and quickly displayed in its 3.5” color screen. The TOPDON BT600 also features a mini-USB port, which can be used to optimize software and fix bugs for life at no additional cost. (Only Compatible with Windows Systems.)

More Convenience with Long Cable --- The BT600 battery tester 12V&24V comes with reinforced, smoke-free, spark-free copper clamps, and its reverse polarity protection will prevent battery damage, keeping users and cars safe at all times. This car battery tester also gives users more flexibility with 5.9ft of wire, allowing technician to run battery tests and charging tests alone while positioning himself in driver's seat. This auto battery tester can select from up to 8 languages.

Good Value for Money---This automotive battery tester12V 24V can read VCC and CCA values of car batteries accurately, offering users a more accurate result compared to most battery testers of a similar price point. Suitable for auto shops, battery dealers, and battery testing for used cars, the BT600 offers the capabilities of a top-notch product at a cost-effective price💰, making this a great tool for the money.
description: Product Description BT600 PRO-LEVEL CAR BATTERY TESTER The BT600 is one of TOPDON's pro-level battery tester for 12V and 24V vehicles. With a 3.5" color screen and a built-in thermal printer, this tool offers the ultimate solution for accurate, fast, and convenient testing. 1.Battery Tests: Supports battery tests for 12V batteries, shows a battery's health, current, charge, voltage, internal resistance, and rated CCA. 2.Cranking Tests: Supports cranking tests for 12V/24V batteries, the tool supplies information about the cranking voltage and time. 3.Charging Tests: Supports charging tests for 12V/24V batteries and displays the charging system's voltage output. 4.A built-in thermal printer allows users to print reports immediately after performing battery tests. 5.The Review Data Function can save data from the last test performed, giving users an emergency second chance if the need should arise. 6.Supports 12V & 24V Lead-Acid batteries (CCA 100 to 2000A), such as regular flooded, AGM flat, AGM spiral, GEL, and EFB batteries. 7.Suitable for technicians, auto shops, battery dealers; works on boats, lawn mowers, sedans, trucks, and motorcycles. 8.Operates in 8 languages: English, French, Spanish, German, Japanese, Italian, Portuguese, or Russian. Built To Analyze More Information With the BT600, you will get a top-notch battery tester with an improved display. Now you can see all test results on a 3.5" Color Screen and analyze data with exceptional visual clarity. Print Test Reports in Real-Time The built-in thermal printer allows users to print reports immediately after performing battery tests, suitable for shops to print out whenever a proof or record is needed. (The BT600 comes with 3 rolls of printer paper.) A Tool Made For The Garage The BT600 battery tester is enhanced with an anti-slip design for a firm grip whenever you're working. Measuring 8.58 x 5.27 x 2.24 inches and weighing 19.4 oz, the BT600 is at home on the jobsite. Intuitive and Simple User Interface The BT600 car battery tester comes with intuitive user interface, providing simple operation, and easy access to desired functions. The title bar and menu items on screen are displayed in different colors, assisting users to identify the testing result quickly and clearly. Professional Level TOPDON BT600 Equipped with multiple navigation keys, the BT600 allows users to access desired functions and perform testing jobs with ease. Test results which are up to 99.5% accurate can be clearly and quickly displayed in its improved 3.5" color screen. The TOPDON BT600 also features a mini-USB port, which can be used to optimize software and fix bugs for life at no additional cost. (Only Compatible with Windows Systems.) The TOPDON BT600 battery tester gives users more flexibility with 5.9 feet (1.8 meters) of wire, allowing technicians to run cranking tests or charging tests by themselves. This device also comes with reinforced, smoke-free, spark-free copper clamps, and its reverse polarity protection can keep users and cars safe at all times. Operate in 8 languages: English, French, Spanish, German, Japanese, Italian, Portuguese, or Russian. 1. TOPDON Car Battery Tester BT600 2. Battery Test Cable 3. User Manual 4. 3 Rolls of Printer Paper 5. Mini USB Cable 6. Carrying Bag Do More With Less Compared to other battery testers, the BT600 offers a more professional and accurate result with 99.5% testing accuracy, making it a cost-effective tester for auto shops; Compared with higher-priced battery testers, the BT600 is more cost effective and provides user precise data for analysis , the best tool for the money.
